module_info.docstring:
HTTP Rate Limiting Tests.

Comprehensive tests for HTTP rate limiting mechanisms:
1. Rate limit enabled/disabled behavior
2. Token bucket burst capacity
3. Token bucket refill rate
4. Per-endpoint limits (tools vs resources)
5. Rate limit key derivation
6. 429 response format
7. Health endpoint bypass
8. Different limits for different endpoint types

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-9z5

methods.name: test_rate_limit_disabled_allows_unlimited_requests
methods.docstring: With rate limiting disabled, unlimited requests are allowed.

methods.name: test_rate_limit_enabled_enforces_limits
methods.docstring: With rate limiting enabled, requests beyond burst are blocked.

classes.name: TestTokenBucketBurst
classes.docstring: Test token bucket burst capacity behavior.

methods.name: test_burst_allows_multiple_rapid_requests
methods.docstring: Burst capacity allows multiple rapid requests.

methods.name: test_burst_of_one_limits_immediately
methods.docstring: With burst=1, second request is immediately rate limited.

methods.name: test_burst_defaults_to_rpm_when_not_set
methods.docstring: When burst is 0 or not set, it defaults to max(1, rpm).

classes.name: TestPerEndpointLimits
classes.docstring: Test different rate limits for tools vs resources.

methods.name: test_tools_and_resources_have_separate_limits
methods.docstring: Tools and resources have independent rate limit buckets.

methods.name: test_resources_have_higher_default_limit
methods.docstring: Resources default to higher rate limit than tools.

classes.name: TestRateLimitResponse
classes.docstring: Test rate limit exceeded response format.

methods.name: test_429_returns_json_response
methods.docstring: Rate limit exceeded returns JSON with detail message.

methods.name: test_429_content_type_is_json
methods.docstring: Rate limit response has JSON content type.

classes.name: TestHealthEndpointBypass
classes.docstring: Test that health endpoints bypass rate limiting.

methods.name: test_health_liveness_bypasses_rate_limit
methods.docstring: Liveness endpoint is not rate limited.

methods.name: test_health_readiness_bypasses_rate_limit
methods.docstring: Readiness endpoint is not rate limited.

classes.name: TestRateLimitHelpers
classes.docstring: Test internal rate limiting helper functions.

methods.name: test_rate_limits_burst_defaults_to_rpm
methods.docstring: When burst is 0, defaults to max(1, rpm).

methods.name: test_rate_limits_burst_minimum_is_one
methods.docstring: Burst is at least 1 even when rpm would make it 0.

methods.name: test_per_tool_rate_limiting
methods.docstring: Different tools have separate rate limit buckets.

classes.name: TestCORSPreflightBypass
classes.docstring: Test that CORS preflight bypasses rate limiting.

classes.name: TestZeroRateLimit
classes.docstring: Test behavior with zero or negative rate limits.

methods.name: test_zero_rpm_allows_all_requests
methods.docstring: With rate_limit_per_minute=0, all requests are allowed.
